channel.title: Fibich Blog
channel.description: Development notes, release updates, and behind-the-scenes writing for Fibich, a macOS music player.

item.title: From Project Name to Shippable Player
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich moves toward release readiness with project renaming, notarized builds, dependency cleanup, visual polish, ordered drops, and playlist search.

item.title: Best Lossless Audio Formats in 2026
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: A practical guide to FLAC, ALAC, WAV, AIFF, WavPack, APE, DSD, and the perks of keeping a lossless music library.

item.title: Choosing Where the Music Plays
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich improves playlist enqueueing and library drag and drop, then adds a persistent macOS audio output device picker.

item.title: Handling the Messy Edges of Real Music Libraries
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich improves folder drops, external playlist tracks, album sorting, MP3 edge cases, CUE sheet playback, and queueing from the library.

item.title: Making Large Playlists Behave
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich improves playlist scale, metadata synchronization, search, presentation snapshots, layout, and realtime track move handling.

item.title: Making Fibich Feel Like a Daily Player
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich gets cleaner controls, a menu bar player, settings, artwork loading, performance tuning, and better metadata text repair.

item.title: Keeping the Library Alive
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich starts watching library folders, reconciling file changes, and keeping the music catalog connected to disk.

item.title: Editing the Music, Not Just Playing It
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich gains metadata editing with drafts, validation, read/write storage, tests, and a more focused sheet-based editor.

item.title: Making Playlists Stay
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich adds SwiftData-backed playlist persistence so multiple playlists can survive beyond the current session.

item.title: Making the Playlist More Personal
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich adds configurable playlist metadata columns, draggable ordering, reusable drag handling, and Show in Finder.

item.title: From Drag and Drop to Now Playing
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich adds drag and drop, broader file support, playlist durations, and macOS Now Playing integration.

item.title: More Than One Playlist
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich adds multiple playlist tabs, playlist renaming, and better playlist switching behavior.

item.title: Opening Music the Mac Way
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich starts accepting music files opened from macOS and improves playlist selection and removal.

item.title: Making the Playlist Easier to Read
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich adds resizable, persistent playlist columns and separates playlist sorting from library browsing.

item.title: Finding Music Once the Library Grows
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich adds full-text library filtering and basic sorting so larger local music collections become easier to navigate.

item.title: Cleaning the Engine Room
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich moves SFBAudioEngine into Swift Package Manager and refactors library loading for a cleaner foundation.

item.title: Making the Library Remember
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich moves toward stronger persistence, clearer metadata, and a local music library that can remember its shape.

item.title: The Playlist Starts to Matter
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich adds its first playlist implementation, beginning the shift from single-track playback toward longer listening sessions.

item.title: From Empty Window to First Playback
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Fibich reaches its first playback milestone with basic audio playback, track progress, seeking, and volume control.

item.title: Why Build Another macOS Music Player?
item.dc:creator: Antonin Charvat
item.description: Today I started building Fibich, a native macOS music player for people who still care about their own music files.
